description_long: This is a hand axe featuring a robust, dark metal head with a wide, curved cutting edge and a pronounced beard, suitable for chopping or splitting wood. The blade is thick and solid, with a matte black finish that suggests durability and resistance to corrosion. The handle is made of natural wood, displaying a visible grain pattern and a gentle curve for ergonomic grip and improved leverage. The wood is smoothly finished but retains a slightly rustic appearance, with a rounded end for secure handling. The head is mounted traditionally onto the handle, with no visible screws or bolts, indicating a wedged or pressure-fit attachment. There are no visible markings, engravings, or labels on either the blade or the handle.
description: A sturdy hand axe with a matte black metal blade and a curved wooden handle, designed for chopping tasks. The axe features a wide cutting edge and a natural wood grip.
description_view_0: The axe is seen from the top, showing the narrow profile of the blade and the rounded end of the wooden handle.
description_view_1: The left side view highlights the broad, curved blade and the full length of the wooden handle, displaying its grain and ergonomic curve.
description_view_2: The axe is viewed from the back, revealing the thickness of the blade and the straight alignment of the handle.
description_view_3: The right side view shows the opposite face of the blade and handle, mirroring the left but with subtle differences in wood grain and blade curvature.
attribute_handle_type: Curved wooden handle with visible grain, rounded end, smooth finish, and oval cross-section for ergonomic grip.
attribute_blade_design: Single wide, curved edge with a pronounced beard and thick poll, matte black finish, no decorative features.
attribute_mounting_style: Traditional wedged mounting with the blade fitted onto the handle, no visible fasteners.
